browserImports.title: Browser Imports
browserImports.selectToPreview: Select an import to preview. No Office or WPS document is modified until you confirm.
browserImports.noDocumentSelected: Select an exact Word document before planning.
browserImports.truncatedWarning: The provider DOM was truncated or virtualized; unloaded history is not included.

officeIntegration.title: Office Formula Integration

hint.auto: Word uses native OMML. Excel and PowerPoint prefer editable OLE and fall back to compatible images when OLE is unavailable.
hint.native: Word uses native OMML. Excel and PowerPoint use compatible images with metadata.
hint.image: All hosts use compatible images. They remain visible and copyable; double-click editing depends on the Office add-in.
hint.ole: All hosts embed editable OLE formula objects. Double-click opens LaTeXSnipper.
hint.vector: Force SVG vector EMF. Formulas that cannot be converted to SVG will fall back to PNG.

officeIntegration.oleBitnessMismatch: Office bitness does not match the OLE component
officeIntegration.convertWarning: Conversion changes the host object type. The original object is removed only after the new object has been validated.
officeIntegration.fallbackImage: OLE is unavailable. Inserted as a compatible image instead.

errors.officeHostNotSelected: Select a target Office host first.
errors.oleRegistrationMissing: The LaTeXSnipper OLE component is not registered. Run Repair OLE Component from Settings.
errors.oleEditFailed: The OLE formula editing session could not be opened. The original object was not changed.
errors.integrationModeUnsupported: The selected integration mode is not supported by the current Office host.
